entry.title: Batch and Country of Origin details in INTRASTAT Report-VE01
entry.content:
Hello All,

Could you please help how to populate values of batch & Country of origin details in INTRASTAT Report (VE01) for invoice. 

With Batch split and without batch split need to populate values in INSTRAT Report.

 

Thanks & Regards

Sivasharan

entry.title: Activating the business function ‘FINS_PARALLEL_ACCOUNTING_BF' in sandbox system
entry.content:
Dear Team,

We are currently testing the ABAVN (asset retirement) and ABAON (asset scrapping) processes using custom workflow functionality. The requirement is to auto-populate all mandatory fields for these transactions from a custom dashboard, present the values to the user for simulation/review, and then proceed with posting based on the user’s confirmation.
The ABAP team has proposed testing the API_FIXEDASSETRETIREMENT_G4BA API to meet the auto-population and posting needs. However, per the SAP Business Accelerator Hub page “Overview | Fixed Asset – Post Asset Retirement , use of this API requires activation of the business function “Universal Parallel Accounting” (FINS_PARALLEL_ACCOUNTING_BF). Based on SAP Note 3191636 (“Universal Parallel Accounting: Scope Information, this activation may have significant system-wide implications.
We are performing the initial testing in the sandbox using representative master and transaction data. If successful, the plan is to evaluate the impact, proceed with activation in the target system as appropriate, and then propose the end-to-end solution to the business.

We are not planning to implement CO-PA at this time. However, SAP Note 3191636 indicates that activating the “Universal Parallel Accounting” business function (FINS_PARALLEL_ACCOUNTING_BF) can also impact CO-PA.

Question: Can we proceed with activating this business function to enable testing? If yes, is activation reversible (i.e., can it be deactivated later), and would it still be feasible to activate/deploy the impacted application components (including CO-PA along with below given one's, if needed) after this business function is enabled?

  • FI-GL (General Ledger Accounting)
  • FI-AA (Asset Accounting)
  • CO-OM (Overhead Cost Controlling)
  • CO-PC-OBJ (Cost Object Controlling)
  • CO-PC-OBJ-EBR (Event-Based Revenue Recognition)
  • CO-PC-PCP (Product Cost Planning)
  • CO-PC-ACT (Actual Costing)
  • CO-PC-ML (Material Subledger)
  • CO-PA (Margin Analysis)
  • CO-FIO-OM (Overhead Management)
  • IM (Investment Management)
  • MM-IM-VP (Inventory Balance Sheet Valuation)
  • MM-SRV (External Services)
  • RE-FX (Flexible Real Estate Management)

 

Please review the request above and share your inputs/recommendations. I’d appreciate your guidance on the best path forward.  

 

Thank you., 

Regards,

Durgarao.T

entry.title: Unable to adapt standard Fiori Travel Request app – modification not supported
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I want to make changes in a standard Fiori application. I tried adapting the Travel Request Fiori standard app in BAS using UI Adaptation, but the current version does not support this change. Modification of the standard application is not supported.

I also tried making the same change from SAP Logon, but the issue still remains and the modification is not possible.

I have attached all the error screenshots and mentioned where the changes were attempted for your reference.

 

Thanks & regrds,

Amruta

entry.title: Condition Contract Turnover Profile / Konditionskontrakt Profile zur Umsatzermittlung Gutschriften
entry.content:
Perhaps somebody can help - in the turnover calculation there is for customer Bonus 0S01 following table VWB2_VBRKVBRP_1

 

Bsuiness Volume from Billing document but Credit or Debit notes are note in these tables

 

EG: Customer has Invoices with volume 0f 500€ and received a credit note with value of 50 € than the bonus basis shoul be 450 € and not 500 but in our system the Credit note is not deducted from the turnover. Anybody who coould help?

entry.title: SAP Fiori List report app does not load automatically when navigating back to app
entry.content:
In Adaptation project which is built on a Fiori list report app, the app data does not load automatically when navigated back to this application. User has to manually click on Go. There is a mandatory filter in app, which has data when app loads.

This was working in earlier versions, but stopped working after upgrading to S4HANA 2023.

We have tried various properties in manifest of main application to enable auto loading, but its not working. 

Can someone please provide possible solutions.

entry.title: SAP UI5: ISSUE : Calling Deep Entity of JSON - SAP UI5 - V2 OData - Standard API
entry.content:
{
  "BusinessPartnerCategory": "2",
  "BusinessPartnerGrouping": "0001",
  "OrganizationBPName1": "My Deep Insert Customer",
  "CorrespondenceLanguage": "EN",
  "to_BusinessPartnerRole": [{
      "BusinessPartnerRole": "FLCU01"
  }],
  "to_BusinessPartnerAddress": [
    {
      "CityName": "Hyderabad",
       "ValidityStartDate" :"2024-09-23T00:00:00",
       "ValidityEndDate" : "9999-12-31T00:00:00" ,
      "PostalCode": "101175",
      "StreetName": "Platz der Republik",
      "AddressTimeZone" : "INDIA" ,
      "Country": "IN",
      "Language": "EN",
      "to_EmailAddress": [
        { "EmailAddress": "contact@example.com" }
      ],
      "to_MobilePhoneNumber": [
        {
          "PhoneNumber": "9876543210",
          "IsDefaultPhoneNumber": true
        }
      ],
      "to_AddressUsage": [
        { "AddressUsage": "XXDEFAULT" }
      ]
    }
  ],
  "to_Customer": {
    "Customer": "B000000992",
    "CustomerAccountGroup" :"DEBI",                // leave blank for internal number range
    "to_CustomerCompany": [
      {
        "CompanyCode": "1710",
        "ReconciliationAccount": "12100000",
        "PaymentTerms": "0001"
      }
    ],
    "to_CustomerSalesArea": [
      {
        "SalesOrganization": "1710",
        "DistributionChannel": "10",
        "Division": "00",
        "Currency": "EUR",
        "CustomerPricingProcedure": "1",
        "CustomerAccountAssignmentGroup": "01",
        "CustomerPaymentTerms": "0001",
        "ShippingCondition": "01",
        "SupplyingPlant": "1710",
        "SalesDistrict": "US0001",  
        "CustomerPriceGroup": "01",  
        "to_PartnerFunction": [
          {
            "PartnerFunction": "SP",
            "Customer": "B000000992"                   
          }
        ]
      }
    ]
  }
}

The Above is the JSON Payload which i am trying to access in my sap ui5 table 

    <Table
                id="CustomerTable"
                width="100%"
                growing="true"
                growingThreshold="10"
                sticky="ColumnHeaders"
                inset="false"
                class="sapUiSizeCompact"
                items="{ 
                    path: 'Customer_Model>/A_BusinessPartner', 
                    parameters: { 
                        expand: 'to_BusinessPartnerAddress/to_EmailAddress,to_BusinessPartnerAddress/to_MobilePhoneNumber' 
                    } 
                }"
            >
                <headerToolbar>
                    <Toolbar class="sapUiTinyMarginBottom">
                        <Title text="Customers" level="H2" />
                        <ToolbarSpacer />
                        <SearchField
                            id="custSearch"
                            width="300px"
                            placeholder="Search Customer"
                            search="onCustSearch"
                            liveChange="onCustSearch"
                        />
                    </Toolbar>
                </headerToolbar>
                
                <columns>
                    <Column>
                        <Text text="Business Partner" />
                    </Column>
                    <Column>
                        <Text text="Organisation Name" />
                    </Column>
                    <Column>
                        <Text text="BusinessPartnerFullName" />
                    </Column>

                    
                   
                </columns>
                <items>
                    <ColumnListItem
                        type="Navigation"
                        press="onCustItemPress"
                    >
                        <cells>
                            <ObjectIdentifier
                                title="{Customer_Model>BusinessPartner}"
                            />
                            <Text text="{Customer_Model>OrganizationBPName1}" />

                  </cells>
                    </ColumnListItem>
                </items>
            </Table>

in the above table i want to access the email, phone number, address 

Data Paths Used:

  • Address: {Customer_Model>to_BusinessPartnerAddress/0/CityName}, {Customer_Model>to_BusinessPartnerAddress/0/Country}

  • Email: {Customer_Model>to_BusinessPartnerAddress/0/to_EmailAddress/0/EmailAddress}

  • Phone: {Customer_Model>to_BusinessPartnerAddress/0/to_MobilePhoneNumber/0/PhoneNumber}


    please help me in this

entry.title: Avoid create sales order from certain sales office and invoice from certain business area
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community

Sales Order creation in VA01

I have Sales office1, Sales office2 and Sales office3 in the same sales organization.

Sales office1 and Sales office2 could create also sales orders in Sales office3. However, Sales office3 shouldn't create the sales order in the rest of the Sales offices.

We have a role that has V_VBAK_VKO with the sales organization and channel distribution.

We have try to add the sales office to block in VA01, but it hasn´t worked. It seems that it isn´t work in sales office level. Is it this correct or is there a way it can work?

I've seen the OSS note 3046057 - Authorization check regarding sales office and sales group in sales document. This note have an example to create a z authorization object. Can´t we manage it by authorizations in roles, without ABAP? It's just I wanted to know if there weren't any other way apart from using user-exit.

Invoice creation in VF01 and VF04

We have the same problem at invoice creation VF01 and VF04 transaction, how to manage the authorizations in roles to filter by business area? I have business area1 and 2 that can see BA3, but BA3 shouldn´t see BA1 and BA2. We are using V_VBRK_VKO. Is there a way to manage by standard authorization objects?

 

Kindly ask for your advice and thank you in advance.

Best regards

entry.title: Issue with Japanese IME Input Recognition in Value Help Search Field (Fiori Elements)
entry.content:
In a SAP Fiori Elements application running on SAPUI5 1.120.2, using OData V4 and CAPM (Nodejs) as backend service, we implement Value Help using annotations only (@Common.ValueList).


When users input Japanese text using IME in the search field inside the Value Help and perform conversion (space + enter), the latest converted value is not recognized by the search field for the first time. If user closes the Value Help dialog and enters the input again for the second time, the search field works as expected.


Unexpected result: 

  • The result list is not updated according to the latest input.

Expected Result: 

  • The result list should be updated immediately based on the final converted Japanese text, without requiring the dialog to be reopened.
Question:  Has anyone experienced this issue before? If so, how was it resolved? Any guidance would be appreciated.

entry.title: Comp code 1000, actg principle GAAP: 1 Fixed assets with processing errors message AB256"
entry.content: We are getting issue while posting depreciation. Depreciation has been posted for all assets in this company code 1000 except 2 assets. We are getting error "Comp code 1000, actg principle GAAP: 1 Fixed assets with processing errors message AB256" for these 2 assets

entry.title: I want to know is it possible to save the column width in variante.
entry.content:
Hello All,

I have a question regarding column width settings. Whenever I adjust a new column and set its width, the changes are lost after refreshing the page.

I would like to know whether it is possible to save the column width in a variant, so that the settings are retained even after a refresh.

Regards,
Snigdha R

entry.title: UI5/Fiori Elements V4 Upgrade: Navigating the AddressViaNavigationPath Breaking Change
entry.content:
# Introduction

Recently, I upgraded a UI5 and Fiori Elements V4 application from version 1.132.1 to 1.136.13. While the upgrade process was relatively smooth, I encountered an interesting breaking change related to entity associations and PATCH requests that I'd like to share with the community.

## The Issue

During testing, I discovered that PATCH requests for nested entity associations were suddenly failing after the upgrade. The root cause? A behavioral change in how the framework constructs update paths for related entities.

### What Changed

In versions prior to 1.135, when updating entities with one-to-many associations, the framework used **short paths** in PATCH requests. However, starting with version 1.135 and continuing through 1.136.13, the framework began using **long paths** when the following annotation was present at the entity container level:

```xml
<Annotation Term="Common.AddressViaNavigationPath" Bool="true"/>
```

**Example of the difference:**
- **Short path (old behavior):** `/EntityA(key1)/NavPropertyB/EntityB(key2)`
- **Long path (new behavior):** `/EntityA(key1)/to_NavPropertyB(key2)`

This change broke compatibility with existing backend services that expected the short path format.

## The Solution

The fix is straightforward and should be applied at the **CDS annotation level**. You need to explicitly set the `@Common.AddressViaNavigationPath` annotation to `false` on your entities:

```cds
@Common.AddressViaNavigationPath: false
entity MyEntity {
// entity definition
}
```

### Implementation Steps

1. **Locate affected entities** - Identify entities with one-to-many associations that are being updated
2. **Add the annotation** - Apply `@Common.AddressViaNavigationPath: false` to the entity definition
3. **Test PATCH requests** - Verify that update requests now use short paths
4. **Redeploy** - Deploy your changes and test end-to-end

## Why This Matters

This breaking change highlights an important principle when upgrading frameworks: **always test data modifications thoroughly**. While UI rendering changes are often immediately visible, changes to request payload structures can silently break integrations.

## Conclusion

If you're upgrading to Fiori Elements V4 1.135 or later and experience issues with entity updates, check your entity annotations. A simple `@Common.AddressViaNavigationPath: false` annotation can restore the previous behavior and ensure backward compatibility with your backend services.

Have you encountered similar breaking changes during upgrades? Share your experiences in the comments below!

entry.title: API to S4 Tables to Azure
entry.content: Need guidance on how to configure a connection from Azure Cloud to SAP S4 tables for extraction of transactional data from ACDOCA

entry.title: Wrong behavior of sap.ui.core.theming.Parameters for sap.gantt.simple.GanttChartContainer
entry.content:
Hi,

After upgrading our system to S4/2023 and the latest available SAPUI5 ABAP Patch 1.120.39, i get this error from rendering the GanttChart we use in one of our views: [FUTURE FATAL] One or more parameters could not be found. - sap.ui.core.theming.Parameters. I debuged this and realized, that the hex color we use for the property "fill" in the sap.gantt.simple.BaseRectangle, will pass directly to the parameter sName from sap/ui/core/theming/Parameters.js and at the moment the method with the propertyName: sName is returned, the error appeare in the console. It seems, the difference between a real parameter name and a hex color can't be distinguished and therefore, i get too many errors, that i sent above, in the console.

Could you please help me to solve this?

 

Best regards,

Setareh Ganjimanesh

entry.title: Earlywatch FDQ Financial Data Integrity
entry.content:
Hi,

In the EarlyWatch, in the chapter Financial Data Quality, we have paragraph :

15.1.1 Mismatch of Function Setting between Master Data and Items

....

Type 2: Mismatch of function setting between master data (marked as not open item managed) data and items (marked as open item managed).

The following list shows G/L accounts that have a mismatch between master data and item settings:

Error Type

Company Code

G/L Account

Fiscal Year

Analysis Date

Error Description

3

1005

0031000004

1999

30.06.2024

 

3

1001

0033000000

1999

30.06.2024

 

3

1004

0030000002

1999

30.06.2024

 

3

1005

0038000000

1999

30.06.2024

 

We have already applyed the SAP Note 175960. anr ran programm ZF_SWITCH_OFF_XOPVW , but those result still appear with the analysis date at 30.06.2024.

Which program do we need to run to restart the analysis that generates this report?

Thanks

entry.title: sap.ui.mdc.ValueHelp - how to display different Operators for "Define Conditions" panel?
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I am currently implementing a value help via sap.ui.mdc.ValueHelp.

I used the example of the DemoKit as reference and I want to display the "Define Conditions" panel.

My problem now is that only the operator "EQ" is available for the conditions and nothing I tried seems to work (I tried to use the

sap.ui.mdc.field.ConditionsType, tried to set property "operators" for the defined FilterField).
 
You can reproduce the scenario in the Demo Kit expamle by adding <mdcvc:Conditions></mdcvc:Conditions> to the mdcvh:Dialog content aggregation:

https://ui5.sap.com/1.136/#/entity/sap.ui.mdc.ValueHelp/sample/sap.ui.mdc.demokit.sample.FieldValueHelpJson/code 

How can I provide more operators like Contains, StartsWith etc.?

I appreciate any help!

 

Thanks in advance

Julia

entry.title: Error encountered in Stylesheet after implementing latest patch SAPUI5
entry.content:
After implementing the latest patch update of SAPUI5 they encountered stylesheet 404 error aborted. Below error was encountered by other user.

 

Error:

includeStylesheet-dbg.js:77  GET https://gs.tst.gea.com/sap/bc/ui5_ui5/sap/processroutes1/~0538751110A5A16D011429B8A432672F~5/themes/sap_horizon/library.css?version=${version}&sap-ui-dist-version=1.120.43 net::ERR_ABORTED 404 (Not Found)

entry.title: Need to Archive 6 6 years o Performance Forms
entry.content: My Company will need to archive about 21 team members' forms (last 6 years) is it possible to do multiple years at the same time for each team member instead of doing it one year at a time for all 21 team members?

entry.title: Add CA10 Standard Text to Operation Long Text in S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
In S/4HANA Public Cloud, is there a supported way to insert or reuse CA10 standard texts in the operation long text of maintenance task lists?

In ECC / SAP GUI there is an option to insert standard text (CA10) directly into the long text. In the Fiori app Change General Maintenance Task List, this option does not seem to be available.

Is there:

  • a standard function or workaround to insert CA10 texts into operation long texts, or
  • a recommended best practice for reusing standard texts in task list operations in S/4HANA Public Cloud?

Any clarification would be appreciated.

Thanks!

entry.title: Custom controller for a Fiori elements V4 app
entry.content:
Hello 


I have created a custom SAP Fiori elements List Report app in BTP BAS using a backend OData V4 service, which is working fine.

I now need to add a new action to the app. When the user clicks this button, a popup should open containing a table with multiple rows selected from the initial screen. Since this could not be achieved using RAP functionality alone, I am trying to implement it using a custom controller extension.

I have enhanced the MANIFEST.json file and created a new action button and controller extension.

However, when I click the new button, the 'onOpenPopup'  method is not being triggered.  Any inputs? IS my approach correct?.

I see the onInit, onBeforeRendering and onAfterRendering  triggering during initial load of the app.

Thank you !

 new  button and controller extension in manifest.json

 


Mycontroller:

entry.title: Fiori List Report Issue with OData V4 VS V2
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We have created a OData V4 Fiori List Report Template.

Here are we are facing couple of Issue
Backend CDS View is Parameterized CDS View.

So the CDS Parameters are going to be Mandatory for the Selection or execute. Here when we are trying to add the new filter by using the Adopt filter options those filters are also showing in UI as Mandatory. ( Only Visual as * )
Table Settings, When we are selecting the columns to display in V2 App we can see the options as Show Selected / select all columns. Here we are seeing it has Deselect all.
